steps.t: The road to An Shêru runs by Zajâna. You should begin by going to the north-east.
Something strikes you as suspicious about the signpost north-east of Zajâna.
If Dagûrum had allies, leaving the signpost as it is may help them ambush other travellers. You should repair the signpost and ruin their plans.
The road to An Shêru leads north-west of Zajâna.
Brigands may have tampered with the signpost north of Zajâna as well.
You should repair this signpost north of Zajâna as you repaired the other.
Rahâzi has arrived in the company of two Hamâti soldiers.
The Hold of Jalkhíla is located to the east in Kighân.
Rahâzi asked you to meet up with her party at Gadim-ûn in An Shêru.
